perturbation.original_text: FIRST LEVEL OF MAINTENANCE means MORPHO will require the Kuwait Government to contact MORPHO maintenance personnel for all problems associated with the installed Force Field PSS System. MORPHO will respond with fixes and/or workarounds to keep the system operational. MORPHO personnel may document any software problems and refer them to XIMAGE for additional fixes or patches.
perturbation.changed_text: FIRST LEVEL OF MAINTENANCE means MORPHO will address Force Field PSS System issues. MORPHO personnel may document software problems and refer them to XIMAGE.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the specific obligations for MORPHO to require the Kuwait Government to contact MORPHO maintenance personnel and respond with fixes and/or workarounds, the modified text creates an in-text contradiction. Section 3, 'SOFTWARE MAINTENANCE SERVICES,' states that XIMAGE will provide remedial maintenance service (i.e., error fixing and/or workarounds). The removal of MORPHO's explicit responsibility creates ambiguity as to whether the Kuwait Government should directly contact XIMAGE, contradicting the intended support escalation path.
perturbation.contradicted_text: XIMAGE will provide to MORPHO during the term hereof "Software Maintenance Services" which shall include remedial maintenance service (i.e, error fixing and/or work arounds) for any significant error, malfunction or defect (collectively in "Error") in the Software so that the Software will operate in accordance with the specifications set forth in the related documentation.
perturbation.justification: The original text clearly defines MORPHO's initial responsibility to address Force Field PSS System issues with fixes and workarounds. The changed text removes this explicit obligation, creating ambiguity about who is responsible for the initial troubleshooting and support. This removal contradicts the 'Contradicted Text,' which states that XIMAGE will provide remedial maintenance (error fixing and/or workarounds). Since the original text made MORPHO responsible for initial fixes, while the contradicted text describes XIMAGE doing that, removing this from the Changed Text introduces a contradiction about which party the Kuwait Government should contact first. The removed obligation, in conjunction with the 'Contradicted Text', makes it unclear about the support escalation path, thus causing a strong in-text contradiction per the Omissions definition.

perturbation.original_text: In such cases where on site intervention is required MORPHO shall pay for all travel expenses (Business Class), hotel accomodation and reasonable subsistence. XIMAGE shall charge for the time of the engineer only when he/she is on site or in exceptional circumstances when away from the site but directly involved in work connected with the PSS. XIMAGE will not charge for travel time. All interventions on site are subject to a minimum total charge of $2,000. Hourly rate for intervention is $125.00 (one hundred and twenty five Dollars). Following any intervention on site XIMAGE shall provide a full written technical report to MORPHO.
perturbation.changed_text: In cases of required on-site intervention, MORPHO will cover travel and accommodation expenses. Following on-site intervention, XIMAGE will provide a technical report to MORPHO.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the stipulations:  'XIMAGE shall charge for the time of the engineer only when he/she is on site or in exceptional circumstances when away from the site but directly involved in work connected with the PSS. XIMAGE will not charge for travel time. All interventions on site are subject to a minimum total charge of $2,000. Hourly rate for intervention is $125.00 (one hundred and twenty five Dollars)', the modified text generates an in-text contradiction with section 6, 'CHARGES.' The charges and fees associated to the engineer presence on site is now ambiguous, given this lack of details. This ambiguity weakens the financial clarity of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The total annual maintenance charge amounts to US $24502 for the first year of maintenance. MORPHO shall pay all charges under this Agreement, including the total Annual Maintenance Charge, within thirty (30) days after receipt of a valid invoice from XIMAGE.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies the charges for engineer time, travel, and a minimum intervention fee. The changed text omits these details, creating ambiguity about the charges. This omission directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that 'MORPHO shall pay all charges under this Agreement'. Without the specifics outlined in the original text, the amount and type of 'charges' Morpho is obligated to pay becomes unclear, resulting in a strong in-text contradiction as defined under 'Omissions – In Text Contradiction'.
